author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (locking foundation + DRM modeset):

- kernel/locking/qspinlock.md: covers kernel/locking/qspinlock.c — qspinlock 4-byte universal spinlock with fast-path single-cmpxchg uncontended acquire + MCS-style queued slow-path on contention; per-NUMA-node 4-tail bit-encoded queues (no extra per-lock memory); per-CPU 4-context MCS node array (task/softirq/hardirq/nmi); paravirt extension (pv_wait + pv_kick for vCPU yield/IPI) for KVM guest contention; ACQUIRE/RELEASE memory ordering pairings; pending-bit fast-path for first waiter. 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (mcs-OOB + tail-overflow + lock-word-atomicity + cmpxchg-progress) / Layer-2 ref to qspinlock_mcs.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus mutual-exclusion proof.
- drivers/gpu/drm/atomic.md: covers drm_atomic.c + drm_atomic_helper.c + state-helper + uapi — DRM atomic-modeset commit pipeline (every Wayland compositor depends): per-state-object lifecycle with refcount across commit-tail, check-then-swap-then-commit-tail pipeline, per-CRTC fence (IN_FENCE_FD + OUT_FENCE_PTR + GEM-implicit), nonblocking commits serialized per-CRTC via prior.flip_done, async commit fast-path for cursor-only updates, ww_mutex wound-wait for cross-CRTC lock acquire. 10 REQ / 9 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + swap-atomicity + per-CRTC-serialize + check-no-mutation) / Layer-2 ref to atomic_commit.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus commit semantic equivalence.

Total state: 246 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 12 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-locking-qspinlock, design-drivers-gpu-drm-atomic.

Next iter plan: kernel/perf/perf-event-core.md (perf_event_open subsystem; foundation for every perf/bpf-via-perf consumer) + drivers/scsi/scsi-mid-core.md (SCSI middle-layer foundation; underpins all SCSI ULDs).
